ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the city's population */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the city based on population */,
  "state" TEXT /* State in which the city is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the city belongs to (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the city's mayor */,
  "city_budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the state */,
  "largest_city" TEXT /* Largest city in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the recorded population */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population recorded for that year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate for that year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_trends_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each urban initiative */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city ID where the initiative is implemented */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the initiative */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the initiative */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the initiative */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the initiative */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the initiative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_initiatives_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city ID providing the service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service */,
  "service_description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_city_services_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy" (
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city ID */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the city */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income of the city */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economy_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city ID */,
  "median_home_price" REAL /* Median home price in the city */,
  "rental_rate" REAL /* Average rental rate in the city */,
  "vacancy_rate" REAL /* Vacancy rate of housing in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_rates" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city ID */,
  "crime_type" TEXT /* Type of crime (e.g., violent, property) */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 1000 residents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_rates_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city ID */,
  "high_school_graduation_rate" REAL /* High school graduation rate */,
  "college_graduation_rate" REAL /* College graduation rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city ID */,
  "public_transport_usage" REAL /* Percentage of residents using public transportation */,
  "bike_friendliness" REAL /* Bike-friendliness rating (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)
